info.name: SpeedCopy Complete API
info.description: Complete API collection for SpeedCopy multi-role platform covering Auth, Shopping, Printing, Gifting, Orders, Payments, Vendor, Delivery, Admin and more.

exec: var shops = json.shops || json.locations || json.data || json;

body.raw:
{
  "subject": "Order not delivered",
  "description": "My order was supposed to arrive yesterday.",
  "category": "delivery_issue",
  "priority": "high",
  "orderId": "{{orderId}}"
}
